info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: vyAGraBUtyAdimate sewkaH ayam  BAzyAdimate aniwkaH  ' vindate vindatItyevaM lABe vedayate Rici ' (Slo. 111) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'na hi praveda sukftasya panTAm' (f॰10.71.6) na praveda=suzWu na veda
'yA~Sca vidma yA~ u ca na pravidma' (f॰10.15.13)
'mA ta idaM puzwaM kaScana pravidata' (Sa॰brA॰1.9.1.5) mA pravidata=mA prApat=mA smAsadat
'tasmAd brAhmaRaH pARqityaM nirvidya bAlyena tizWAset' (bf0 u0 351) nirvidya niHSezeRa viditveti SaNkaraH prApyeti gopAlAnandasvAmI
'sato banDumasati niravindan' (f0 10129 4) anvizyAvindan prApnuvan
'aTa svapnasya nirvide'BuYjataSca revataH' (f0 112012) nirvide=nirmokzAya parihftaye

'kIrtiM SriyA praRayinIM labDayADiviveda saH' (rAja0 5135) jIvantyAmUQapUrvAyAM striyAM dvitIyasyA vedanamaDivedanaM Bavati aDivettA puruzo Bavati tatra praTamA dvitIyAyAM karaRe tftIyA prayujyate pUrvasyAM tu dvitIyeti pratizWito vyavahAraH kAlidAsastv imaM vyavahAramanyaTayati tadasya niraNkuSatvamAtraM na vyavahAravikalpaH--aDivividuramAtyErAhftAstasya yUnaH

'praTamaparigfhIte SrIBuvO rAjakanyAH' (raGu0 18 52).. atra dvitIyaparigrahaBUtAnAM rAjakanyAnAm aDivedanakriyAyAM kartftvaM praTamAntatvaM ca vyavahAraM Banakti itTamBUtaprayoge DAtvarTAsaNgatiScABivyakteti vyaktam priyavAdinIM maDuraBAziRIM yastyajati aDivindati (yAjYa0 176 mitAkzarAyAm)
'aDivinnA tu yA nArI nirgacCedruzitA gfhAt' (manu0 983) aDivinnA kftADivedanA
'banDyA'zwame'DivettavyA' (manu0 981) ukto'rTaH
'sa devezu na pratyavindat' (E0 brA0 45) sa indro'paraM svAtiriktaM SUraM nApnodityAha
'paYcAlarAjastu vizaRRarUpastAn pARqavAnaprativindamAnaH' (BA0 Adi0 19214) aprativindamAno'pratilaBamAnaH ajAnAna iti tAtparyArTaH
'nAgnayaH parivindanti na vedA na tapAMsi ca' (atrisaM0 Slo0 110) (kftyakalpatarO dvitIye sampure 112 pf0 SAtAtapavacanamityudDftam) na parivindanti jyezWaM parityajya kanizWaM na prApnuvantItyarTaH
'kulawonmattacOrAMSca parivindanna duzyati' (goBi0 smf0 174) etezvanUQezu satsu BAryAmupayacCamAnaH

'yanma Atmano mindA'BUt punaragniScakzuradAt ityetAByAmaBinirmuktAByuditaparyAhita-parIzwa-parivitta0' (Apa0 SrO0 931270) yasmiYjyezWe'nAttAMSe kanizWoM'SaM gfhRIyAtsa jyezWaH parivittaH mindA SarIravikftiH durBagatvacihnam
'yeBiH pASEH parivitto nibadDaH' (aTarva0 61123) jyezWe'kftadAraparigrahe pUrvaM gfhItadAraH agrediDizurityarTaH loke tu sa parivettfpadenocyate
'parivittiH parivettA yayA ca parividyate' (manu0 3172)
'dArAgnihotra-saMyogaM kurute yo'graje sTite parivettA sa vijYeyaH parivittistu pUrvajaH' (manu0 3171).. nigadavyAKyAtam
'jAtyanDabaDire mUke na dozaH parivedane' (atrisaM0 Slo0 105) jyAyasa etAn parivarjya dArakarmaRi dozo netyAha
'jyezWe'nivizwe kanIyAnniviSamAnaH parivettA Bavati parivittirjyezWaH parivedanI kanyA' (yAjYa0 3265 mitAkzarAyAM hArItavacanam) aBivyaktAyAM candrikAyAM kiM dIpikApOnaruktyena
